title: carex salina subsp. epigejos
intro: Carex salina subsp. epigejos, also known as sea sedge or sea club-rush, is a type of sedge that is native to coastal areas in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex salina subsp. epigejos include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
